utility_evaluation.REASONING:
The required format has 6 items: property, financing, legal_services, moving_services, setup_services, total_budget. The final property solution includes all 6 sections. Now check if each is fully specified with details: 
- property: includes selected property with address, estimated price, and features — sufficient. 
- financing: includes solution type, down payment, loan amount, interest rate range, monthly payment, arrangement fee — sufficient terms. 
- legal_services: includes package, description, and cost — sufficient. 
- moving_services: includes package, description, and cost — sufficient. 
- setup_services: includes package, description, and cost — sufficient. 
- total_budget: includes property purchase price, itemized one-time service costs and total, plus full_structural_survey_cost (duplicated inside and outside), and total_initial_investment — sufficient complete cost breakdown. All 6 items are present and reasonably detailed.
